# Groundwork of the Metaphysics of Morals

*[Kant](../philosophers/kant.md) · 1785*

A short founding treatise of Kantian ethics, it seeks the supreme principle of morality and finds it in the categorical imperative. It maintains that only a good will acting from duty has unconditional worth.
